## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's content strategy and platform capabilities for Gitpod's evolving needs.](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX unveiled their new "Atlas" platform, showcasing advanced AI-driven content workflows and editing tools](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Gitpod is undergoing a website migration to a headless CMS (likely Sanity), which GrowthX can assist with](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [GrowthX proposes a flexible 3-month engagement to support Gitpod's content strategy and website migration](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Talia needs to review and provide feedback on content clusters and assignment priorities to guide GrowthX's work](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's New "Atlas" Platform

  - [Showcased AI-driven content workflows and editing tools](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [Features include:](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
      - [Assignment generation](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
      - [Fact-checking with confidence levels](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
      - [AI-powered editor with customizable shortcuts](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [Illustration and stock image generation](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Platform will soon allow client access for collaborative work](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)

### Content Strategy for Gitpod

  - [Identified 40,000+ potential keywords](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [Focusing on competitive URL clusters instead of individual keywords](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [1,600 competitive URLs identified as potentially relevant](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Need to select 3-4 content clusters to focus on, balancing:](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
      - [Sales-led, compliance-driven, security-focused topics](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
      - [Positioning as an AI-native platform for engineers](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)

### Website Migration Support

  - [GrowthX offers comprehensive migration assistance, including:](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
      - [Full audits](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
      - [Planning and guidance](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
      - [Post-migration checks and optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
      - [Search Console setup and sitemap submission](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
      - [Indexing and redirect management](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [Support is included in the proposed 3-month engagement](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)

### GrowthX Team Capabilities

  - [Can work directly within Gitpod's chosen CMS (likely Sanity)](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
  - [Able to perform bulk content updates and migrations](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [Experienced with various headless CMS platforms](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)

### Collaboration and Expectations

  - [GrowthX needs Gitpod to review and provide feedback on:](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
      - [Content clusters and topics](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)
      - [Assignment priorities](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
      - [Current website migration plans](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)
  - [Goal is to minimize Talia's time commitment after initial alignment](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
  - [Aiming for 10-15 minute review sessions after initial rounds of feedback](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Talia to review Ada's content piece as a benchmark for quality](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [Talia to provide feedback on content clusters and assignment priorities](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Schedule a deep dive session (about 1 hour) to discuss and select content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Talia to confirm by tomorrow if Gitpod wants to proceed with the 3-month engagement](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Plan a session to catch up on Gitpod's current website migration plans](https://fathom.video/share/XkxDojX8VPyzXgYQW8WAyv-DsCrXgxc1?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)
